finding: A source-changing backlog fix with an uncommitted deliverable was classified by `next --claim --auto-intent` as `closeout-only`, forcing release and an explicit `--claim-intent write` reclaim before work could begin.
expectedBehavior: Auto-intent now requires scoped delivery evidence before treating existing deliverables in `HEAD` as closeout-only; pre-existing deliverables without a task delivery commit resolve to `write` with reason `delivery-evidence-not-found`.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by delivery commit `973f854025b7c5390e16a51d51ae07543e9449e6` and close commit `551507b7f428d3beef2c3ec99c2c6b359d433a82`. Evidence: `node --strip-types tests/cli/tasks-claim-auto-intent.test.ts`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run validate:cli`, and `npm run validate:git-head-evidence` passed for TASK-AAO-0181.
followUp: Regression now covers pre-existing deliverables without delivery evidence, dirty in-scope source, delivered task with scoped commit evidence, and explicit closeout-only conflict recovery.
